programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the City of Angels five hotshot pro poker players hope for a WPT title.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT Invitational VII is a high stakes Hollywood poker party.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's Freddy's game to lose but the invitation is wide open to snatch a WPT title from his grasp.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The most successful female tournament player takes dead aim on her first WPT championship.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Sparks fly in Northern California as the players takes aim at chip leader Kathy Liebert.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Vadim Trincher presses his relentless attacks in pursuit of the $730,000 first place prize.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Street Kings
programme.desc: When evidence implicates a veteran LAPD cop in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of his entire career.

programme.title: Criminal Law
programme.desc: Attorney Oldman successfully defends accused killer Kevin Bacon. It is only after proving his client's innocence by discrediting eyewitness, that Oldman discovers Bacon is guilty--and intends to kill again.

programme.title: The Russia House
programme.desc: From the pen of master spy novelist John LeCarre comes this riveting tale in which a British publisher (Sean Connery) and a beautiful Russian editor (Michele Pfeiffer) are sucked into the deadly world of espionage.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members of a spaceship wake up from hypersleep to discover that all their colleagues are missing. Despite this, it appears that they are not alone. Starring: Dennis Quaid, Ben Foster, Cam Gigandet

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: Jacq Vaucan (Antonio Banderas, 'The Mask of Zorro') is an insurance agent of ROC robotics corporation who investigates cases of robots violating their primary protocols against altering themselves.

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Walk to Freedom
programme.desc: Hundreds of migrants try to enter the US every day. Some are forced to work as drug mules, with many perishing during the harsh desert crossing.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Bricks in the Wall
programme.desc: Arrests spike along the border wall as residents of India and Pakistan leap over, right into the hands of the border patrol. Other teams investigate new smuggling tunnels

programme.title: Drug Wars: Joint Operations
programme.desc: For the first time, camera crews are allowed inside the Foreign Operations Branch Mission, a joint partnership between US authorities and Mexican Federales.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Trap is Set
programme.desc: With dangerous threats identified and targeted, the Foreign Operations Branch and other units partner together to apprehend convicted felons and smugglers.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Stranded
programme.desc: The U.S Border Patrol received some solid intel about smugglers heading from Dominican Republic to Puerto Rico

programme.title: Drug Wars: Going Fishing
programme.desc: Dominican Republic has been combating narcotraffic for decades, but now an influx of traffickers with loads of cocaine has wrecked havoc on the island

programme.title: Drug Wars: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: After tracking down the Venezuelan Cartel boss in the Dominican Republic, local law enforcement prepares an operation to intercept his fast boat full of drugs heading towards the island

programme.title: Drug Wars: Take Down
programme.desc: Dominican authorities now have enough evidence to arrest the Cartel boss, but with his drugs having being seized, it looks like he will make a getaway to the airport

programme.title: Drug Wars: Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Panama Law enforcement gets intel on a drug exchange between smugglers. Units head out to surprise the traffickers, but upon arrival, unexpected turn of events changes the mission

programme.title: Drug Wars: Ferry Dust
programme.desc: In Panama, Police units arrested two smugglers who claim local gangs stole their drugs. Now the search begins to hunt down the gangster responsible

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Frankenstein's Castle of Freaks
programme.desc: When a Neanderthal man is lynched by villagers, Count Frankenstein (Rossano Brazzi) uses his years of research to bring the monster back to life. (1984)

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Van Helsing
programme.desc: England, 1897. Van Helsing receives a letter requesting his urgent assistance in the northern town of Whitby and follows the trail to the coffin of Count Dracula himself. A fresh take on the legend of Dracula through the eyes of his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Lady Frankenstein
programme.desc: When Dr. Frankenstein is killed by a monster he created, his daughter and his lab assistant Marshall continue his experiments. The two fall in love and attempt to transplant Marshall's brain into the muscular body of the retarded servant Stephen.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert sets out to climb Evergreen Mountain alone to prove his independence. Meanwhile, Cyril Sneer plots to stop him to keep a hidden family secret safe. As Bert faces danger and doubt, he must rely on courage and determination to succeed.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Ralph take Cedric camping at their childhood fort, but to join their club, Cedric must spend the night in a haunted house alone. As fear sets in, Cedric discovers inner bravery while the others anxiously wait to see if he succeeds.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril and Mammoth Motors plan to build a factory that will harm the forest. To stop him, Bert and his friends create a solar-powered car to race against Cyril’s Sneermobile, with the future of Evergreen Forest depending on the outcome.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated, Cedric runs away and stays with the Raccoons. At the same time, Julie and Tommy run away but become lost in the forest. The gang must find them quickly while helping Cedric deal with his feelings about his father.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert, Cedric, and Broo discover a treasure map and begin searching the forest for hidden riches. When Cyril learns of their quest, he schemes to claim the treasure for himself, turning the search into a race filled with tricks and surprises.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph and Cedric become trapped in Cyril Sneer’s new vault, which is filled with dangerous traps. Bert, Melissa, and Broo attempt a daring rescue, and even Cyril must help as they work together to escape before it is too late.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph receives a job offer in the city, and Ranger Dan is given a similar chance. Bert worries the group will split apart and be unable to stop Cyril’s plans, forcing everyone to decide whether to follow opportunity or stay together.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After telling too many wild stories, Bert is no longer believed when he discovers Cyril plans to pave the forest into a parking lot. With no one trusting him, Bert must find proof quickly before Cyril carries out his destructive plan.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.desc: In a day filled with explosive surprises, Team Brandori looks for a big win as the Alvarado Brothers take a gamble and let the pros get under their skin. A fiery contraption has T Money wondering if he scored big or will go down in flames.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go for the gold – but find something even better. Jesse takes a swing at Team Brandori, while T- Money does some dangerous bidding of his own. Will Scott and Chrissy drive away with the golden prize?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: In one of the most unusual, big money auctions yet, Sean auctions the contents of abandoned big-rigs. Scott and Jesse go head to head over a space age haul, while Brandon and Lori take a chance on a battle-ready rig.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The Alvarado brothers find an unusual collectible hiding in plain sight -- but are they going to flush their money down the toilet? It’s wheels up for Papa Bear when he takes a gamble on a mysterious covered item.

programme.desc: Does Big Bear mean Big Money? The Alvarados get sneaky while Desert Dan horses around, and frustration gets the best of Brandori. Do they strike gold or strike out? As Jesse crushes dreams, who will go home empty-handed?

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mothers And Sons

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Filial Duty

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Old Ghosts

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jase and the Argonauts
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Playhouse
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalogue, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep themselves. But the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Big LeCOWski
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Governor's Travels
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack and Gown
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack Draft
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Back to Oakland
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Correspondent
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Aloha
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies
programme.desc: An elite group of power players may be plotting the fate of the planet. Discover the secrets behind ten powerful hidden organisations around the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Time Travel
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Alien Attack
programme.desc: Secret satellites. Death stars. The weaponisation of outer space. Are governments the world over preparing for an alien attack? And if so, why are we being kept in the dark?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Doomsday
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans' time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kirby
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Search
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Idonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty: Samantha
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior.Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Blaire & Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret.

programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater

programme.desc: The team have a record number of cars to auction, but Derek finds room for one more, a replica AC Cobra. A couple are reunited with their Volvo breakdown truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews attend an explosion, a dislocated knee and a motorcyclist who's spun off the road. An elderly patient is taken to the hospice via the beach.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The medics help a man bleeding profusely, another who is in agony after falling and a woman with a cripplingly painful bowel condition.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.desc: Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings the crew a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns disaster when Suzette is not happy with the final look, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble

programme.title: Hitler & The Nazis

programme.title: Hitler & The Nazis

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Combat Land
programme.desc: The Turtles are invited to be the first guests at combat Land, an amusement park where visitors fight a wide variety of robotic warriors from various historical eras.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder Triumphant!
programme.desc: The Turtles face their greatest challenge ever when they become trapped in Dimension X--while Shredder and Krang bring the Technodrome out of the ocean depths and at last conquer the city!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzly and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzly, who is trying to have a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play kite surf with a homemade kite. Grizzly notices that the she-bear he's in love with watches the kite perform arabesques in the sky with admiration.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy snatches the last jar of chocolate spread out from under the noses of the Lemmings. In exchange, he offers them the toy stuck inside the lid, a mini-flute.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play a new game, floating like flags in the breeze from the fan set on maximum. But Grizzy quickly rids the living room of this interference.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzly remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzly imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Hoenn region is on Ash's mind, and he's preparing to board a ship bound there when Team Rocket strikes! With Pikachu missing and time running out before the boat leaves, can Ash get his adventure back on track?

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Pikachu is suffering from a serious electrical overload! Can Ash and Professor Birch find a solution before it's too late?

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: A power failure at the Pokémon Center leads Ash and his new friend May to an astonishing discovery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When Team Rocket turns a flock of Taillow against our heroes, an old friend comes to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet an eccentric Trainer who challenges May to her very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Our heroes are on the trail of a Pokémon poacher, and Team Rocket is close behind!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash's Treecko takes on a wild Seviper, but things don't go so well…

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Stopping in Rinshin Town, our heroes investigate the mystery of a haunted mansion!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children learn about the number four, and the Teletubbies decide to go into the house. One by one, they leave. So, who is in the house?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little girl have her hair braided by her mum. They put different coloured bands in her hair. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky can't sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they stand up and sit down to some music. They watch some children perform a 'Jack in the Box' dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Five voice trumpets rises and plays some lovely music for the Teletubbies, who dance around Home Hill. Two girls have brought some new Tropical fish.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Laa-Laa burst out of the house, dance, have a big hug and go back inside, they do it again until the windmill announces the animals marching through Teletubbyland. Dipsy and Po burst out of the house, dance, have a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding the ducks. Po finds a new trick to play with Tubby Toast. Three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children recite and act out a nursery rhyme. In Teletubbyland Po follows Tinky Winky, they go over the hills, along the path, between the trees, into the house, around the toaster and into bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a twisty dance, then they watch two children rollerblading in New York. The Noo Noo tidies up Tinky Winky's Tubby Toast, so Tinky Winky chases him round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind the hill and rush off to see a little Indian boy playing on a drum called a Tabla. In Teletubbyland, it's time for Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run indoors and then run out again to watch Andy Brown and Georgina wash a baby elephant. Laa-Laa and Dipsy have a messy accident.

programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Vadim Trincher presses his relentless attacks in pursuit of the $730,000 first place prize.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: Black Caesar
programme.desc: The brutal assault at the hands of a racist cop will inform the life of Tommy Gibbs (Fred Williamson, Hammer), who will grow up to become the reigning head of Harlem’s black mafia in Black Caesar.

programme.title: The Bat
programme.desc: A crazed killer known as "The Bat" is on the loose in a mansion full of people.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Enemies Closer
programme.desc: Deep within a forest on the US-Canadian border, two sworn enemies must work together to escape a ruthless drug cartel hell-bent on retrieving a drug shipment which went missing there.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: The Russia House
programme.desc: From the pen of master spy novelist John LeCarre comes this riveting tale in which a British publisher (Sean Connery) and a beautiful Russian editor (Michele Pfeiffer) are sucked into the deadly world of espionage.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Socialite Molly is released from prison after serving a 6-year sentence for the murder of her husband and sets out to prove her innocence with the help of Fran, an investigative reporter who uncovers a conspiracy of silence and a shocking secret.

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital.

programme.title: Outpost 11
programme.desc: Set in an alternative past where steam power still rules the world, outpost 11 is the story of three soldiers manning a remote listening post in the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Sun
programme.desc: Two countries race to have the first successful landing on Mars.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: University students Holly Dunn and Chris Maier are ambushed along railway tracks in August 1997. By 1999, a string of similar attacks leads police to Angel Maturino Reséndiz, who travels by freight train between murders across three states.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz visits the volcano that stopped air travel in 2010; predicting probabilities in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of IVF; following couples who undertake IVF treatment; going 360 degrees on a swing.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Boat made out of ice; comets; science behind hypothermia.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Understanding the devastating Japanese earthquake.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Jem builds a laser; Yan recreates a demonstration to calculate the speed of light.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Bites
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with the fiercest of bites roam.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Fiordland National Park
programme.desc: Sharks are the ocean’s ultimate predator. At the top of the food chain, many species of sharks are capable of killing quickly and efficiently anything they attack.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Beaks and Talons
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where masters of the sky sweep from above with their fierce beaks and razor sharp talons.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: Arthur: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List
programme.desc: Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale
programme.desc: It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Hitler & The Nazis
programme.desc: Peak of Power: Documenting the peak of Hitler's power and his plan to invade Great Britain.

programme.title: Hitler & The Nazis
programme.desc: The fall of a hate-fueled and manipulative madman, and those who faithfully followed him from the invasion at Normandy, the death camps of Auschwitz-Birkenau, the military failure at Stalingrad, and the fall of Berlin.

programme.title: World War I in the Trenches
programme.desc: Experience first hand "the war to end all wars." WWI was the first war in history to affect most of the globe, with battles fought on land, at sea and, for the first time, in the sky.

programme.title: World War I in the Trenches
programme.desc: WW1 starts with the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand of Austria-Hungary in 1914, in Sarajevo. The assassination triggered a chain of events as Austria-Hungary declared war on Serbia, leading to a series of treaties being activated.

programme.title: World War I in the Trenches
programme.desc: The conflict sawa- the development of trench warfare, with major battles such as the Battle of the Marne, the First Battle of Ypres, and the Race to the Sea, leading to a stalemate that set the stage for the prolonged and devastating nature of the war.

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII

programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.desc: A young woman is found bound and strangled to death on the side of a road. As police retrace her final steps, they discover she was last seen being followed by a suspicious man in a cowboy hat.

programme.title: On the Case: Twice Is No Accident
programme.desc: When Fran Smith mysteriously disappears her sister and daughter mount their own investigation... What they uncover sends police on a cross country man hunt for a killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Lies
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, 41-year-old Nancy Menke, a mother of four, is found handcuffed and murdered in the passenger seat of her car; a records clerk in the insurance fraud unit stumbles upon a strange report that blows open Menke's murder case.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: November 21, 1988, Sheriff's deputies received an alarming phone call from a convenience store in Leesville, Louisiana. A delivery person said the clerk who signs for deliveries was missing and the store's cash register was open and empty

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Stalker
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Penny Chang of Shaker Heights, Ohio was stalked and killed by her older brother’s best friend, 21-year-old Scott Strothers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Billy Fox, 33, is a devoted father of two and a soccer coach. He appears to be an all-around regular guy. But he’s booked for the death of a baby. It's a charge that could put him in prison for the rest of his life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: A report on problems which arise when children under the age of 17 receive unwanted sexual letters on the Internet, focusing on Lindsay, a 14-year-old suburban Florida girl who began receiving explicit love letters from a stranger in Greece.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Secret Life of Eric Wright
programme.desc: In 1980, Kathi Spiars met a man who called himself Steve Marcum, and shortly married him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: For Love or Money?
programme.desc: Celeste Beard claims she is innocent of the murder of her husband Steven Beard, co-founder of an Austin television station. After a life of abuse and depression, Celeste married Beard. In October 1999, Beard was fatally shot while lying in bed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Prosecutor?
programme.desc: Steve Tauzer, a prominent assistant district attorney in Kern County, CA, was found murdered in his garage. Chris Hillis, a former police officer, a colleague and friend of Tauzer, was arrested for the murder. Chris’ son Lance was key to the case.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Kevin develops symptoms of anxiety and a correct diagnosis seems impossible. Carlyn is an active, young mother whose health declines soon after getting breast augmentation.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Track star Emily experiences intense stomach pain initially diagnosed as IBS. A seemingly innocent mark on her Carrie's big toe is initially dismissed by a dermatologist.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Marie experiences symptoms of Vertigo. That would be better for Marie than what doctors eventually find. Latoya is told she has miscarried, but it's possible the doctors missed something.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Kyle Lewis loves summer and swimming. When he develops a headache and a high fever his parents take him to the hospital, and doctors race to find out what is wrong with Kyle.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent Gilmer was described as a kind man before he shockingly murdered his father. But why did his behavior change?

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A murder investigation spans across multiple states after suitcases containing severed body parts wash ashore on Virginia Beach.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On the rural floodplain of northwestern Kentucky, spring rains wash human bones from a culvert near where a missing man, Rodney "Bo" Hale, was last seen three years ago.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A rural Utah town located in the Rocky Mountains experiences a nightmarish Christmas when a woman is found brutally stabbed to death; due to the wintry weather, detectives have their hands full as they search for her killer.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: The condition of a mummified body that is found in the arid farmlands of Solano County, Calif., in 1996 leaves it unidentified for over 10 years, but when a cold case is reexamined, a startling connection is made.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: DJ Steven B. Williams mysteriously disappears off the coast of California, and once police begin their search, they soon learn this is no ordinary missing persons case, as a multi-million dollar inheritance has also vanished.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: When a mother of three vanishes after a 1986 blizzard, Connecticut police are led to a chilling theory when the trail of evidence brings them to the shores of an icy lake.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files
programme.desc: Fake celebrity clairvoyant Williams preyed on the elderly by performing fake readings, including one where he directed his client to a forged will.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Stephen Klenczar – Bogus Barrister
programme.desc: Obsessed with boys toys, he posed as a barrister and claimed he worked for the British Government secret service.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Stranger
programme.desc: Bored at home, a retiree takes a job at a 24-hour convenience store. On her third night at work a customer finds her behind the register in a pool of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: The Case: Alone Against All Odds (Philippe Savelli)

programme.title: The Case: The Last Tango (Bertrand Gelineau)
programme.desc: In November 2006, the relatives of Nicole Saada, a woman in her sixties, came to report her disappearance.

programme.title: The Case: Masterpieces in Peril (Thomas Ethardy)

programme.title: The Case: Mortal Ties (Stéphane Touvet)

programme.title: The Case: The Escape Room From the Baumettes Prison (Pierre Folacci)

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Investigative genetic genealogy is used to bring closure to the 1998 cold case murder of a mother killed in front of her toddler.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Cutting-edge DNA science finally reveals the identity of the 'Phoenix Canal Killer' who terrorised the Arizona city in the early 1990s and brutally took the lives of two women.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Advances in forensic science shine a light on a case that went cold for decades, revealing the name of a serial killer who murdered two women in the late 80s in Orange County, California.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, a woman in Rankin County, Mississippi, was kidnapped and raped at knifepoint, but the case went cold for decades until a DNA match from an unrelated crime identified the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1972, a young woman was discovered covered in blood by the road in Snohomish County, in the US state of Washington, and passed away a short time after being taken to hospital.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.desc: Tempers flare as the comedians take pot shots at one another during a hunting challenge, but they come together to in an effort to convert David Mitchell to their whacky new religion.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall

programme.desc: Steven and Crystal McDowell were never a good match, and for years after they split, Steven deluded himself that reconciliation was just around the corner. Then, Crystal disappeared during a deadly hurricane. Was she the victim of a natural disaster?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Colleagues and customers at the pharmacy owned by Jessica and Mitesh Patel recall how abusive, controlling and sometimes violent Mitesh was towards his wife. But they had no idea that he was hatching a plan to brutally end the marriage.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Reality Check
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identify which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Whose Trash Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hello and Farewell - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Silent Bell

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Return of the Ice Monster: A giant ice creature is spotted in Alaska, a jet has a close encounter with a UFO, and evidence of a lightning strike invites paranormal speculation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
